title: Task 5: 编写测试 (All ACs)
summary: The commit range (7fc2de4..HEAD) contains only documentation changes - updating dev-log.md and implementation-artifacts/CORE-005.md to mark Task 5 as complete. No actual code changes exist in this range. However, the required tests already existed in the codebase prior to this commit range, and they correctly cover all Task 5 requirements: get_auto_capture_status, tray_quick_note, open_obsidian_folder commands, plus edge cases for path validation.

issues.description: Commit d9e4c0a claims to 'complete Task 5 - verify tests' but contains no code changes. The tests already existed in the codebase before this commit range started. The commit effectively just updates status checkboxes without adding any new code.
issues.recommendation: This is a process issue rather than code issue. Future tasks should ensure commits that claim to complete work actually contain the implementation changes.

strengths: Test coverage is complete for Task 5 requirements: get_auto_capture_status, tray_quick_note, and open_obsidian_folder commands all have tests
Edge case tests are thorough: missing path, empty path, whitespace-only path, and nonexistent path cases are covered
Tests follow project conventions: located in the same module as the code under test, use Chinese error messages, use setup_test_db() pattern
Documentation in dev-log.md clearly explains the testing strategy and CI workaround for screenshot feature tests
